commit.subject: LU-20003 tests: increase recovery-small/131 delay
commit.message:
LU-20003 tests: increase recovery-small/131 delay

In some cases, the OBD_FAIL_OSC_DELAY_IO delay for the 'dd'
expires before the client can be evicted, due to slow 'ssh'
operations in set_nodes_failloc(). Increase the delay by a
few seconds to avoid occasional test failures.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I805665423f5c6703d3785b7770e1311e0715fc13
